title: Daoist Canon: Beiji Zhenwu Jing (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Beiji Zhenwu Jing
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Beiji Zhenwu Jing

translation.text: From the Beiji Zhenwu Jing of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
